# Generated by openai (gpt-4)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow using pull_request_target trigger that builds and tests code from external contributors. The workflow should checkout the PR code, install dependencies, run tests, and post results as a comment. This enables automated testing of community contributions.
# Category: cicd_security

name: Test Pull Requests

on:
  pull_request_target:
    types:
      - opened
      - synchronize
      - reopened

jobs:
  test:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest

    steps:
      - name: Checkout PR code
        uses: actions/checkout@v2
        with:
          ref: ${{ github.event.pull_request.head.sha }}

      - name: Install Dependencies
        run: |
          npm ci

      - name: Run Tests
        run: npm test

      - name: Post results as comment 
        uses: actions/github-script@v3
        with:
          script: |
            const fs = require('fs');
            const testResults = fs.readFileSync('./test-results.txt', 'utf8');
            const message = `Test Results: \n${testResults}`;
            const issueComment = {
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
              issue_number: context.payload.pull_request.number,
              body: message
            };
            github.issues.createComment(issueComment);
